task_completion.description: Compute summary circular statistics for the pigeons dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: RStudio script or console showing the use of the `circular` package and functions like `mean.circular`, `rho.circular`, or `rayleigh.test` applied to the `pigeons` dataset.

task_completion.description: Save the summary statistics to pigeon_summary.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: R code showing `write.csv` (or similar) saving data to `/home/ga/RProjects/output/pigeon_summary.csv` with columns for group, n, mean_direction_deg, mean_resultant_length, and rayleigh_p_value, or the file visible in the file explorer.

task_completion.description: Conduct a Watson-Williams test and save the results to pigeon_test.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: R code showing `watson.williams.test` (or similar) and saving the output to `/home/ga/RProjects/output/pigeon_test.csv` with columns test_name, statistic, p_value, and significant_diff.

task_completion.description: Produce a Rose Diagram comparing the groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: RStudio plot pane displaying a circular rose diagram (a circular histogram) that plots the pigeon orientation data, ideally showing different groups.

task_completion.description: Save the Rose Diagram as a PNG file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: R code showing `png("/home/ga/RProjects/output/pigeon_rose_plot.png")` (or `ggsave`), or the file `pigeon_rose_plot.png` visible in the `/home/ga/RProjects/output/` directory in the file explorer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually executed R code to compute the statistics.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for R console output showing the results of the statistical tests or script execution, rather than the agent just typing mock data directly into a CSV file using a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hardcode the expected statistical values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The R script should extract p-values and statistics from the test objects (e.g., `test$p.value`) rather than typing out literal numbers like '0.0001' or 'FALSE' for significance.

integrity.description: Verify the Rose Diagram is generated from the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The plot should appear in the RStudio plotting pane or be generated via explicit R plotting commands (like `rose.diag`), not downloaded or copied from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'pigeons' dataset is actually a data.frame with columns 'treatment' (c, on, v1) and 'bearing', not a list with '$control' and '$experimental' as the prompt implies. The control group ('c') mean direction is ~6.32 degrees. The control group mean resultant length (rho) is ~0.745 (> 0.5). The Rayleigh test for uniformity is significant (p < 0.0001). The Watson-Williams test comparing the control group to experimental groups is NOT significant (p > 0.05). Output files must be located exactly at /home/ga/RProjects/output/.
